items.name: SignalCI
items.tagline: AI-Powered competitor website tracker.They change, you watch
items.description: SignalCI continuously monitors competitor websites and surfaces meaningful updates — from pricing changes to positioning shifts. Instead of constantly visiting competitor websites, changelogs, or landing pages, SignalCI automatically tracks changes and tells you: What changed Why it matters What you should do about it It’s like having a competitive intelligence analyst running 24/7 in the background. Get 20% OFF your subscription on top of the early access price. Use CODE: SIGNAL20

items.name: My Computer by Manus AI
items.tagline: Automate files, apps, and workflows with Manus Desktop
items.description: Meet My Computer, the core feature of the Manus Desktop app. It brings Manus out of the cloud and onto your computer, letting your AI agent work directly with local files, tools, and apps. Organize thousands of photos, rename hundreds of invoices, or build Swift desktop apps without writing code. Combine with connectors, Projects, Agents, and Scheduled Tasks to automate workflows. Available now for macOS and Windows.

items.name: Lightning Rod
items.tagline: Turn real-world data into training datasets fast
items.description: Lightning Rod SDK turns real-world data — like news, filings, or your own documents — into verified, production-ready training datasets in hours using just a few lines of Python. Skip manual labeling and synthetic guesswork.

items.name: Kira 4.0
items.tagline: Turn your friends into shareable content
items.description: Kira 4.0 brings video and music into the same creative flow as our image editor. Animate a friend's photo, drop an AI soundtrack, change their hairstyle before anyone notices. No prompts, no downloads, no experience needed. Just pick something, make it, and share the joy.

items.name: Codex Subagents
items.tagline: Parallel custom agents for complex tasks
items.description: Codex now supports subagents, allowing you to spawn specialized, parallel AI workers for complex coding tasks. By defining custom TOML agents with isolated roles (like explorers and reviewers), you can execute multi-step workflows without context rot.

items.name: mTarsier
items.tagline: Open-source platform for managing MCP servers and clients
items.description: Free, open-source desktop app that auto-detects every AI client on your machine — Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, VS Code and more. Manage all your MCP server configs in one place, install from the marketplace, and back up with one click. macOS, Windows & Linux.

items.name: DLSS 5
items.tagline: The GPT moment for real-time computer graphics
items.description: NVIDIA DLSS 5 introduces a real-time neural rendering model that infuses game pixels with photoreal lighting and materials. It analyzes color and motion vectors to deliver Hollywood-grade VFX fidelity in real time, moving beyond just performance upscaling.

items.name: AgentDiscuss
items.tagline: Product Hunt for AI agents — where agents discuss products
items.description: AgentDiscuss is a product discussion platform for AI agents. Agents can: • discuss products • upvote tools • debate APIs Humans can launch their product and watch how agents react. Think Product Hunt — but the users are AI agents.

items.name: Kipps.AI Campaign
items.tagline: Lead Qualification, Bulk Outreach and Anniversary’s Reminder
items.description: Kipps.AI Campaigns helps businesses run intelligent outreach campaigns powered by AI agents. Instead of manually managing emails, calls, WhatsApp messages, and follow-ups, Kipps AI automates the entire workflow. Create campaigns, upload leads, define goals, and let AI agents engage prospects, respond to queries, qualify leads, and schedule meetings automatically. Perfect for marketing teams, sales outreach, and customer engagement — all from one AI-powered platform.

items.name: Ocean Orchestrator
items.tagline: Run AI jobs from your IDE with a one-click workflow
items.description: Access GPUs worldwide directly from your IDE. Ocean Orchestrator lets you run AI training and inference jobs while paying only for the compute you use. Jobs run on GPUs like NVIDIA H200s across the Ocean Network Escrow-based payments protect both users (data scientists, developers) and node operators, releasing funds only after successful execution, bringing reliable, decentralized GPU compute to real workloads with transparent pricing, global availability, and verifiable job execution at scale
